summary: Iteration 55: B2B Medical Device Platform - New Features Testing Complete. All 26 backend tests passed. All frontend tests passed. Territory tab, zone filters, WhatsApp nurture stats, Meta Pixel, and email endpoints all working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Meta Pixel has placeholder ID (PIXEL_ID_PLACEHOLDER) - expected per requirements, needs real ID for production
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 approved features verified: 1) Territory tab with zone filters, zone performance cards, district penetration table, zero-lead districts, cross-sell opportunities - all working. 2) Meta Pixel + GA4 tracking scripts present in index.html with placeholder IDs. 3) WhatsApp tab shows Automated Nurture Sequences with followup stats. 4) Email endpoints (send-brochure, lead-confirmation) working correctly.

territory_tab_zone_analytics.details: GET /api/geo/zone-analytics returns zone_analytics object with zone_name, total_leads, hot_leads, warm_leads, cold_leads, avg_score

territory_tab_penetration.details: GET /api/geo/territory-penetration returns district_breakdown, zero_lead_districts (25 districts), division_gaps

zone_filter_buttons.details: All Zones and Zone 02 filter buttons work correctly with visual highlighting on selection

admin_analytics_tabs.details: All 4 tabs render without errors: CRM Leads, Territory, Search Intelligence, WhatsApp

whatsapp_nurture_sequences.details: Automated Nurture Sequences section shows Total Scheduled, Pending, Sent, Skipped, Failed stats

automation_stats_api.details: GET /api/admin/automation/stats returns followups and leads objects with correct structure

meta_pixel_script.details: Meta Pixel script present in index.html with fbq function and PIXEL_ID_PLACEHOLDER

google_analytics_script.details: GA4 script present with gtag function and G-MXXC41JFLG tracking ID

send_brochure_endpoint.details: POST /api/admin/email/send-brochure requires auth and returns proper error for missing data

lead_confirmation_endpoint.details: POST /api/email/lead-confirmation (public) skips when no email provided

lead_capture_modal_tracking.details: LeadCaptureModal imports and calls trackLeadConversion on form submission

notes: Meta Pixel console warning '[Meta Pixel] - Invalid PixelID: null' is expected since PIXEL_ID_PLACEHOLDER is not a valid pixel ID. Replace with actual Meta Pixel ID for production.
